scenarios.title: Browser shows “Not Secure” warning
scenarios.data_search: help desk browser shows not secure warning sign in access browser shows not secure warning your browser is showing a security warning or not secure banner when you reach the rapidreconciler url this is almost always one of two things a stale connection your browser is holding from before the certificate was renewed or a genuine certificate problem on the gsi side the first three steps below take a minute and resolve the typical case you only need it for step 4 what you re seeing the browser displays not secure in the address bar or a full warning page your connection isn t private before the login page loads the error code below the message is usually net err_cert_date_invalid net err_cert_authority_invalid or similar common phrasings the site says it s not secure there s a certificate warning or the lock icon is missing a typical edge cert warning red not secure badge in the address bar full warning page and the net err_cert_date_invalid code at the bottom try these steps in order step 1 close edge completely and reopen most cert warnings right after a renewal are caused by edge holding an open connection from before the new cert was deployed a clean restart of edge resolves the typical case close every edge window not just the affected tab reopen edge from the taskbar or start menu visit the rapidreconciler url again warning gone stop here otherwise continue to step 2 step 2 hard reload the page force the browser to fetch the page and the certificate fresh with the warning page open press shift f5 on windows or cmd shift r on mac warning gone stop here otherwise continue to step 3 step 3 try the url in inprivate or a different browser this is the diagnostic that tells you which side the problem is on inprivate uses a fresh session with no cached connections no cookies no extensions and a different browser uses an entirely separate certificate trust store press ctrl shift n to open an inprivate window in edge or open chrome firefox if you have it visit the same url while you re here click the red not secure badge in the address bar to see the certificate details note the valid to date you ll include it in the support email if you need to escalate read the result warning gone in inprivate a different browser it s a stale local cache continue to step 4 or have it do it still warning in inprivate a different browser the certificate is genuinely broken on the gsi side skip step 4 and email rr support directly using the block below worked in inprivate continue to step 4 still warning everywhere skip to the escalation block below step 4 below is for your it if step 3 confirmed the warning is local works in inprivate fails in normal edge the next step is workstation level cache clearing that needs it click to draft an email with the steps below pre filled generate it email step 4 hand off to it for your it when this applies steps 1 3 didn t resolve it but the url works in inprivate or a different browser that means the cert is renewed on the server and the workstation is holding stale state two paths for it to try in order clear the workstation s cached cert ssl state standard browser network state flush windows ssl state reset via internet options and if needed a sweep of the windows cert store and a full edge restart verify the renewed cert is actually live if the workstation cleanup doesn t resolve it the new cert may not be deployed yet or a cdn load balancer reverse proxy in front of the site may still be serving the old one padlock shows the new cert stop here otherwise escalate to rr support with what was tried still not resolved need help if the steps above didn t resolve it draft an email to rapidreconciler support we ll include the scenario and what you tried email rr support back to help desk

scenarios.title: No data visible after logging in
scenarios.data_search: help desk no data visible after logging in blank or missing data no data visible after logging in you can sign in but the page is blank or shows no figures the cause is almost always something on your network browser or vpn the steps below resolve most cases without contacting support what you re seeing you log in successfully but the reconciliation inventory or other pages are empty the screen shows i see no data the page is blank or everything is empty it started suddenly with no apparent change on your end it affects multiple users at the same time or the opposite only you while coworkers are unaffected common phrasings blank screen on my laptop works for everyone else but me logs in fine on a different computer quick triage first ask is it just you or are coworkers seeing it too the answer changes which steps below are most likely to help only you or only this machine try logging in on a different computer a coworker s your own home machine or a phone tethered laptop or have a coworker try the same page on theirs if rr works elsewhere the issue is isolated to your laptop steps 2 3 are most likely to help plus step 4 asking it to look at this specific machine multiple users at once this is more likely a network or company side change than your machine step 1 vpn and step 4 asking it about recent web filter dns or firewall changes are the high value picks try these steps in order step 1 confirm you re on vpn or the corporate network when this applies you re working remotely from home while travelling or off site rapidreconciler is only reachable from your corporate network or via your organization s vpn if you re disconnected login can succeed but no data will flow if you re working remotely confirm you re connected to your organization s vpn or approved remote access method if you believe you re connected disconnect and reconnect the vpn then hard refresh the browser resolved stop here otherwise continue to step 2 step 2 hard reload the browser when this applies you re confirmed on the corporate network or vpn a stale browser cache or a partially failed initial page load is the most common simple cause press shift f5 on windows or cmd shift r on mac if that doesn t resolve it fully close all browser windows reopen and log in again resolved stop here otherwise continue to step 3 step 3 allow local network access in your browser when this applies your browser was recently updated or this is a new workstation edge and chrome have a permission gate that controls whether sites can connect to local network devices if rapidreconciler isn t on the allowed list all data calls silently fail in edge open settings privacy search and services site permissions all permissions local network access under allowed to connect to any device on your local network verify rapidreconciler getgsi com is present if it s missing click add site and add it hard reload the page and check whether data appears chrome has the equivalent setting under its site permissions area edge settings privacy search and services site permissions all permissions local network access rapidreconciler getgsi com should appear under allowed to connect to any device on your local network if you can t find or change the setting on your machine ask your it department to adjust it resolved stop here otherwise continue to step 4 step 4 check with your it for recent network security or local machine changes when this applies the issue started suddenly multiple users are affected at the same time or steps 1 3 didn t fix a single user single machine issue if multiple users are hit at once a new web filter dns filter secure web gateway or endpoint security policy is the most common cause ask your it contact has anything been turned on updated or changed recently for web filtering dns filtering secure web gateways or endpoint security common products cisco umbrella zscaler cloudflare gateway forcepoint palo alto prisma fortinet sonicwall crowdstrike sentinelone microsoft defender was there a windows update a new vpn client or a switch from split tunnel to full tunnel vpn are other getgsi com domains also blocked e g a related gsi sharepoint site if yes the web filter rule is scoped broader than just rr then run a quick cross network test try rapidreconciler from a different network a mobile hotspot is fine if it works from a different network the issue is on your corporate network ask your it to whitelist rapidreconciler getgsi com on whichever product they identified then hard refresh the browser if only you are affected and rr worked on a different computer the issue is isolated to your laptop ask your it to check local firewall on the affected workstation browser policy or windows group policy that might restrict site permissions or local network access dns settings on this specific machine custom dns server hosts file browser dns over https whether this workstation has a different security profile from coworkers newer endpoint agent isolated vlan etc resolved stop here otherwise continue below to email rr support still not resolved need help if the steps above didn t resolve it draft an email to rapidreconciler support we ll include the scenario and what you tried email rr support back to help desk

scenarios.title: RapidReconciler URL won’t load
scenarios.data_search: help desk rapidreconciler url won t load sign in access for your it rapidreconciler url won t load the page won t load at all you see this site can t be reached or dns_probe_finished_nxdomain instead of the login page this means the url itself can t be resolved the fix usually requires gsi to update a dns record but a couple of quick checks confirm the url you re using before you contact support what you re seeing the browser returns dns_probe_finished_nxdomain this site can t be reached or a similar resolution failure the login page never appears the request fails before any rapidreconciler content loads common phrasings the page won t load site can t be reached the url is broken try these steps in order all steps below are for your it this scenario is fully it side click to draft an email with the steps below pre filled ready to forward to your it department or dba generate it email step 1 confirm the url you re using before anything else check that you re using the url gsi gave you for rapidreconciler not a stale bookmark from a previous server compare the url in the address bar against the url on your most recent gsi documentation or onboarding email try typing the url directly rather than using a saved bookmark confirm spelling especially if the url contains your customer code or business unit resolved stop here otherwise continue to step 2 step 2 test from a different network this single test tells you whether the url is broken everywhere or only on your corporate network from the same machine try the url on a different network a mobile hotspot is fine note whether it works fails the same way or returns a different error read the result works on a different network your corporate network is blocking or filtering the url ask your it to check dns filtering web filtering and firewall rules for getgsi com fails on a different network too the issue is on the gsi side the dns record likely needs attention continue below to email rr support resolved by your it stop here otherwise continue below to email rr support still not resolved need help if the steps above didn t resolve it draft an email to rapidreconciler support we ll include the scenario and what you tried email rr support back to help desk

scenarios.title: Excel export failures
scenarios.data_search: help desk excel export failures daily jobs exports excel export failures you click export or download on a report and nothing happens no file no error message the rr service has gotten stuck and needs a restart the fix is one click of the in ui restart service button though most end users don t see that button it s administrator only by default so for many it s a quick email to their rr administrator the restart takes about 15 minutes to complete what you re seeing you click export to excel or the download button on a report and nothing happens no file is generated and no error is displayed the export worked normally before then stopped working often after the next session the next day or after an idle period common phrasings the export button does nothing excel download isn t working i can t download my report clicking export gives no response try these steps in order step 1 click restart service or have your admin do it the restart service button resets the rr service it sits in the main navigation panel but it s only visible to administrators and power users an admin has explicitly granted access to most end users won t see it if you see the button click it the restart takes about 15 minutes to complete if you don t see the button most end users email your rr administrator a power user at your organization and ask them to click restart service on your behalf they can do it from anywhere nobody needs to touch the server the restart still takes about 15 minutes once they click it don t see the button draft an email to your rr administrator asking them to click restart service on your behalf generate administrator email continue to step 2 once the restart is in progress step 2 once you have confirmation retry the export wait until the restart is confirmed complete either from clicking the button yourself the restart takes about 15 minutes or from your administrator replying that they re done retry the report that originally failed try one or two other reports to confirm exports are working broadly not just for the one you tried first all exports working done if failures recur later continue to step 3 step 3 if it keeps recurring capture the pattern one restart isn t a problem a pattern of needing one daily or weekly is and the pattern itself is the diagnostic clue support needs note the time since the last restart service track how often the issue recurs next day every few days after long idle etc note whether other users at your site hit the same thing at the same time if the workaround is becoming a regular ritual the deeper fix is a full application server reboot scheduled by your it continue to step 4 pattern captured and recurring continue to step 4 step 4 ask your it for a full application server reboot for your it when this applies the restart service workaround from step 1 only lasts about 24 hours and the export keeps failing the pattern from step 3 means the underlying service is in a bad state that a full server reboot will clear whereas a service only restart only resets it briefly the daily service restart is treating the symptom a full reboot should clear the underlying state and give a more durable fix ask your it to schedule a brief outage on the rapidreconciler application server off hours is best have them perform a full reboot of the server not just a service restart send these steps to your it draft an email pre filled with the steps above and what you ve already tried generate it email once it confirms the reboot is done continue to step 5 step 5 retest after the reboot once it has confirmed the server reboot is done retry your exports over the next day or two including the end of day export that was originally failing if exports work normally and stay working done the pattern from step 3 was real and the full reboot cleared it if exports start failing again within a day or so the underlying issue is deeper than what a reboot can clear still failing continue below to email rr support still not resolved need help if the steps above didn t resolve it draft an email to rapidreconciler support we ll include the scenario and what you tried email rr support back to help desk

scenarios.title: Inventory validation light is red
scenarios.data_search: help desk inventory validation light is red status lights red inventory validation light is red the inventory validation indicator in the page header is red what this light checks depends on the module you re in inventory and transfers the prior period s ending variance must equal the current period s carry forward on both the gl balance and the variance carry forward po receipts only that the gl balance rolls forward correctly the light is binary red or green never amber and no other message accompanies the colour change the most common cause is unposted gl batches in the prior period most cases resolve once those batches are posted in jde don t start your month end close until both status lights are green what you re seeing the inventory validation indicator in the page header is red common phrasing the red light came on the page header the left hand inventory validation dot is red while system status remains green try these steps in order step 1 look for unposted gl batches in the prior period when this applies always check this first it resolves roughly 80 of cases rapidreconciler tells you whether unposted gl batches from the prior period are driving the red light you ll find this in the variance calculation section on the main reconciliation page change the period selection in the dropdown to the prior period hover the gl batches label to reveal a click icon then click it to open the pop up look at what s listed what you find decides what happens next entries listed those are the unposted batches they need to be posted in jde the inventory validation light won t go green until the next refresh cycle has run after the posting no entries unposted batches aren t the cause continue to step 2 batches posted wait for the next refresh cycle then re check the indicator no entries or still red after the refresh continue to step 2 step 2 open the inventory validation report when this applies all prior period batches are confirmed posted but the indicator is still red click the red inventory validation indicator rapidreconciler exports an excel report of the period by period roll forward calculation save the file you ll read from it directly to decide what to do next the inventory validation report each row is summary data for one account in one period multiple periods per account stack vertically and multiple accounts can appear one after another filters on the page determine which accounts and periods are included the glok column tells you whether each period s ending gl balance rolled forward into the next period it takes one of four values baseline the earliest period in the data for that account nothing to compare against yes the prior period s ending balance carried forward correctly no the carry forward failed this is the row you act on end the most current period in the data for that account the varok column applies the same yes no to the variance carry forward if glok is no varok will also be no the gl failure cascades got the excel continue to step 3 to read the result step 3 decide based on what the report shows find the row s where glok no or varok no and follow the matching path what the row shows what to do glok no with a non zero amount in unpostbatch for the prior period post the unposted batches in jde the light won t go green until the next refresh cycle has run glok no with a non zero amount in unpostbatch in a period two or more periods in the past the batches are too old for the standard fix email rrsupport getgsi com and attach the excel from step 2 glok no with unpostbatch zero on every row run the jde account repost program r099102 in proof mode for the affected account apply any updates the proof report shows the light won t go green until the next refresh cycle has run if the row instead shows varok no while glok yes the gl is fine but the variance carry forward broke the fix is for an administrator to use the reroll by company function in companies configuration don t have administrator access draft an email to your rr administrator asking them to run reroll by company generate administrator email resolved stop here otherwise continue below to email rr support still not resolved need help if the steps above didn t resolve it draft an email to rapidreconciler support we ll include the scenario and what you tried be sure to attach the inventory validation report excel from step 2 email rr support back to help desk

scenarios.title: I can’t log in
scenarios.data_search: help desk i can t log in sign in access i can t log in several things can prevent you from logging in to rapidreconciler the login screen usually shows a note that identifies which one match what you re seeing to the right option below what you re seeing you can t sign in to rapidreconciler the login form rejects your attempt the login screen shows a note explaining the reason password expired incorrect credentials server unavailable or a generic connection error common phrasings it won t let me in i can t logon i forgot my password or the server s down match the message and follow the path option 1 password expired or incorrect credentials when this applies the login note says your password is expired or your credentials are incorrect rapidreconciler passwords must be reset every 90 days whether yours expired or you simply don t remember it the resolution is the same click the forgot password link on the login screen and follow the reset flow if the forgot password flow doesn t reach you no reset email arrives or the reset link doesn t work email your rr administrator and ask them to help forgot password didn t help draft an email to your rr administrator asking them to reset your password generate administrator email got back in stop here option 2 any other login error for your it when this applies the login screen shows anything other than a credentials issue a connectivity error server unavailable or any error message you don t recognise you won t be able to fix this from the login screen yourself it s a workstation network or server issue your it needs to look at take a screenshot of the error message on the login screen email it to your it using the button below drag the screenshot into the email before you send send to your it draft an email to it drag your screenshot in before sending generate it email it resolved it you re done back to help desk

scenarios.title: RR nightly job has been running for hours / hasn’t completed
scenarios.data_search: help desk rr nightly job running long job won t finish for your it rr nightly job has been running for hours hasn t completed the nightly rapidreconciler job has been running far longer than it usually does sometimes 4 hours sometimes still going at the start of business and it hasn t completed there s no error message and the system status indicator may still show running rather than red today s figures aren t available because the refresh never finished this almost always means the sql server side got stuck on something a long running transaction a blocked session a runaway log growth not a problem with rapidreconciler itself the fix is for your it to stop the running sql job let it roll back and re run it most of the time that clears it different symptom if the system status indicator is red and the job has clearly failed not just hung see system status light is red instead that path covers the post failure environment checks disk tempdb ssis errors what you re seeing the rr nightly job started at its usual time but is still running hours later no error has been raised the system status indicator may show running amber or just data is older than usual the reconciliation page shows yesterday s data or older today s figures aren t available yet common phrasings rr is running long the nightly didn t finish data isn t updating the job s been going since last night recommendations to share with your it step 1 capture the basic context note the following before forwarding to your it the job s normal completion time vs how long it s been running today the date the last successful refresh completed so you know how stale today s figures are whether the system status indicator is amber red or shows running captured forward to your it with steps 2 3 to walk hand off to your it the remaining checks need to be performed by your it department or dba click to draft an email with the steps below pre filled generate it email step 2 for your it stop the running sql job and let it roll back this is the standard fix and it resolves most cases have it do the following on the rapidreconciler database server open sql server management studio sql server agent job activity monitor find the running rapidreconciler job the one that hasn t completed right click stop job wait for the job to finish rolling back don t kill the sql server process or restart the service while a transaction is rolling back let it complete cleanly rollback can take a while sometimes as long as the original run that s normal once job activity monitor shows the job is no longer running re start the job manually right click start job at step first step most of the time the re run completes in its usual time and today s figures appear once it finishes re run completed cleanly stop here you re done job hangs again or rollback never completes continue to step 3 step 3 for your it if it hangs again investigate what s blocking it if the job hangs at the same point on the re run something on the sql server side is consistently blocking it have it check in this order activity monitor active expensive queries and processes while the job is running look for the rr session and check what it s blocked on look at the blocked by column long running transactions or open transactions on tempdb run dbcc opentran on the rapidreconciler database and on tempdb to see if anything s holding locks tempdb log file size and autogrowth a tempdb log that s near full will stall any large operation same goes for the database s own log file rapidreconciler_prod_log ldf free space if needed free disk space on every drive hosting the database the data and log directories and tempdb low free space stalls the job silently recent sql server changes sql patches service account changes antivirus or backup software added log shipping or replication enabled anything that changed since the last successful run is suspect if it identifies and fixes the underlying issue kill the blocking session expand the log free disk space have them re run the job from step 2 issue identified and resolved by it stop here still hangs after the checks above continue below to rr support if your it can t resolve it email rapidreconciler support need help if the steps above didn t resolve it draft an email to rapidreconciler support we ll include the scenario and what you tried email rr support back to help desk

scenarios.title: Data looks old and isn’t refreshing
scenarios.data_search: help desk data looks old and isn t refreshing stale or wrong data data looks old and isn t refreshing rapidreconciler is showing yesterday s or older figures the system status light in the page header tells you what s going on flashing amber the refresh is running right now just wait red the refresh failed see system status light is red instead green the refresh didn t run when it should have the steps below cover that case what you re seeing rapidreconciler is showing yesterday s or older figures rather than current data you expect a scheduled refresh that hasn t happened other parts of rapidreconciler load and look healthy only the data is old try these steps in order step 1 is the refresh actually overdue when this applies the system status light is green not amber not red hover the status indicators in the page header the tooltip shows the last refresh time there is no separate timestamp printed on the page compare that timestamp against your usual refresh schedule if it s from after the most recent expected refresh today s data is in hard reload the page shift f5 on windows cmd shift r on mac to make sure you re not looking at a cached older version refresh overdue and figures genuinely stale continue to step 2 otherwise stop here this is normal pre refresh behavior hand off to your it the remaining checks need to be performed by your it or dba click to draft an email generate it email step 2 possible problem with rapidreconciler job for your it when this applies the system status light is green and step 1 confirmed the refresh is overdue that means the job didn t run when it should have not that it failed the refresh runs through a sql agent job on your database server the job name is typically rapidreconciler_prod your environment may use a custom name standard checks for your it or dba in order is the database server up and reachable most didn t run cases are a server that rebooted or went offline is the sql server agent service running open services msc find sql server agent status should be running set the startup type to automatic so the agent comes back up after a server reboot is the job itself enabled in ssms expand sql server agent jobs find rapidreconciler_prod or your custom name right click confirm it s not disabled check the schedule under properties schedules was it edited paused or deleted what does the history show right click the job view history when did it last run if it never ran on the expected schedule the schedule itself is the suspect if a recent run is missing where you d expect one see the previous bullet run it manually to confirm it works right click the job start job at step watch it complete cleanly then re confirm the schedule will fire next cycle let the user know tell the user the refresh is running fresh figures will appear on the page once the job completes once it runs through these job runs and data refreshes stop here job is broken in a way it can t resolve see need help below need help most cases are customer side the sql server the sql agent service and the job schedule all live on a server your it or dba owns rr support can t reach into your environment to start a stopped service or re enable a disabled job if you have a gsi services contract gsi manages your server for you draft an email to rr support and they ll take it from there email rr support back to help desk

scenarios.title: System status light is red
scenarios.data_search: help desk system status light is red status lights red for your it system status light is red the system status indicator reflects the health of the sql agent job that loads rapidreconciler it appears in the page header on every module the colour is the same wherever you look red means the job didn t complete cleanly so today s figures aren t reliable don t start your month end close until both status lights are green most red lights are caused by something in the sql server ssis environment your it owns out of disk a full tempdb log a failed sql agent job step or an ssis package error have your it walk the checks below before involving rr support many issues clear once the underlying environment is healthy and the job re runs different symptom if the nightly job is still running rather than failed no error just hasn t finished after many hours see rr nightly job running long that path covers stopping the hung sql job and re running it what you re seeing the system status indicator in the page header has turned red the colour is the same on every module it reflects the sql agent job not the page you re on common phrasings system status is red the red light is on the job failed or something crashed reports or scheduled processing didn t complete the way they normally do the page header the right hand system status dot is red while inventory validation remains green recommendations to share with your it step 1 take a screenshot and send it to it take a screenshot of the page header showing the red system status indicator the light is the same on every module so any page works date time company and business unit don t matter for this issue forward the screenshot to your it department or dba the button below drafts an email with the it side checks steps 2 4 pre filled so they have a starting checklist sent use the button below to forward the it checks hand off to your it the remaining checks need to be performed by your it department or dba click to draft an email with the steps below pre filled generate it email step 2 for your it check disk space and tempdb on the database server the most common cause is the sql server host running out of room have it check free disk space on every drive that hosts the rapidreconciler database the sql server data and log directories and tempdb low or zero free space stalls the nightly job tempdb log file size and autogrowth a full tempdb log will fail any large operation if it s near full free space shrink restart the sql service during a maintenance window or expand the drive before re running database log file rapidreconciler_prod_log ldf same check same fix path disk and log space ok continue to step 3 step 3 for your it review sql agent job history for the failed job have it open sql server management studio sql server agent job activity monitor or the job history node on the rapidreconciler database server find the most recent failed rapidreconciler job that lines up with the red light s timestamp open the job s history and read the error message on the failed step common patterns out of disk login failure deadlock package validation error capture the error text that s the most useful artifact if this needs to escalate to rr support found the failed job and captured the error continue to step 4 step 4 for your it pull the integration services ssis report if the failed job was an ssis package the ssis catalog has a more detailed execution report than the sql agent log alone in ssms expand integration services catalogs ssisdb your folder right click the project or package reports standard reports all executions find the failed execution at the timestamp matching the red light open view messages on that execution capture the error messages especially anything labeled error or onerror if it identifies and fixes the underlying issue cleared disk expanded log fixed permissions have them re run the job the status light should clear once the next successful run completes issue identified and resolved by it stop here you re done issue still unclear or not resolved continue below to rr support if your it can t resolve it email rapidreconciler support need help if the steps above didn t resolve it draft an email to rapidreconciler support we ll include the scenario and what you tried email rr support back to help desk

scenarios.title: User can’t see newly granted companies
scenarios.data_search: help desk user can t see newly granted companies blank or missing data user can t see newly granted companies your admin granted you access to additional companies but you don t see them in the company selector your browser session is holding the old narrower permission set a widget refresh or a fresh login almost always fixes it what you re seeing your admin granted you access to one or more companies but when you click into a tab reconciliation inventory etc you see no companies in the company selector your account is active and your admin confirms your access is saved correctly common phrasings i can t see my new company my newly granted companies aren t showing the company dropdown is missing options i should have try these steps in order step 1 ask your admin to confirm your access was saved correctly when this applies always check this first it s the simplest cause if the authorized companies dialog was closed with the x instead of save the changes can be silently dropped the admin thinks they saved your access but the change didn t persist ask your admin to verify open admin users and click the edit pencil icon for your account confirm the right companies are ticked under the column that matches the tab you re trying to use reconciliation has its own column inventory has its own etc if any boxes are unticked tick them and click save not the x saved correctly continue to step 2 step 2 refresh the company selector widget your session is most likely holding the old permission set the widget has a refresh that pulls the latest security from the server on the page you re on click the refresh icon in the top right corner of the company selector widget filter area check whether the missing companies appear resolved stop here otherwise continue to step 3 step 3 log out and back in a fresh login pulls the current security settings from the server and bypasses anything the browser cached for the previous session log out of rapidreconciler completely log back in open the affected tab and check the company selector again resolved stop here otherwise continue to step 4 step 4 hard refresh the browser then log in again this clears any cached page assets that might still be holding old permissions on the affected page press shift f5 on windows or cmd shift r on mac log in again and check the company selector if you still see no companies ask your admin to re open your user record one more time to verify the boxes are still checked closing the dialog with x instead of save can drop the changes silently resolved stop here otherwise continue below to email rr support still not resolved need help if the steps above didn t resolve it draft an email to rapidreconciler support we ll include the scenario and what you tried email rr support back to help desk
